rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.114 governs mandatory school drills and exercises. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: The commissioner, in consultation with the Texas School Safety Center and the state fire marshal, shall adopt rules:
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to school safety drills, not property tax exemptions.
